title: calophanoides kouytcheensis
intro: Calophanoides kouytcheensis, also known as Kouytcheensis or Chinese calophanoides, is a plant species of the Calophanoides genus, belonging to the family Rutaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The plant's extracts have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, contributing to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Calophanoides kouytcheensis include tea, infusion, and extracts, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
